title: Remote Control - How DO I?
description:
Remote Control - How DO I?

Remote Control - How Do I...?

How can I control the RC700 from a PLC?

To control your RC700 controller from a PLC, you need to configure the RC700 for remote I/O.

	From the Setup menu, select System Configuration
	 to open the System Configuration Dialog.
	Select the Remote Inputs page.
	Click the Defaults button to use default
	 remote inputs from either standard I/O or Fieldbus I/O.  Or,
	 you can configure which input signals you want to use.
	Select the Remote Outputs page and select
	 the remote output signals you want to use.
	Select the Configuration page.
	Set the Control Device to Remote.

How can I use my RC700 as a Fieldbus slave?

Your RC700 can be used as a Fieldbus slave device.

	Your controller must have the optional Fieldbus
	 I/O board installed for the Fieldbus protocol you will be using.  See
	 the RC700 manual for details.
	Set the DIP switch on the Fieldbus I/O board
	 for the device ID and baud rate.  See the RC700 manual for details.
	Configure remote inputs and outputs for Fieldbus.
	  See How can I control my RC700 from a PLC for details.
